original_image_tags: Aged, yellowed teletype document with pink stamped headers and two punched holes at the top. There are handwritten annotations in blue and red pencil.

elements.description: A scanned document page consisting of typed text. It includes a header from the Federal Bureau of Investigation, Communications Section, with the word 'TELETYPE' and a date stamp 'DEC -5 1950'. The main text is an urgent teletype message from FBI Washington DC dated 12-5-50 regarding 'DETECTION OF UNIDENTIFIED OBJCXXX OBJECTS OVER OAK RIDGE AREA'. The document includes handwritten annotations, such as 'Flying Saucers' and '162-83894 -', and a vertical note on the right margin. There are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts embedded in this page.

judge.reason: Description A claims the page has pink stamped headers and punched holes, while Description B explicitly states there are no photographs, sketches, diagrams, maps, or charts, contradicting the presence of any visual content beyond typed text.
